name: claude-agent-sdk-pi
description_en: This extension registers a custom provider that routes LLM calls through the **Claude Agent SDK** while **pi executes tools** and renders tool results in the TUI.
description_zh: 此扩展注册一个自定义提供程序，通过 **Claude Agent SDK** 路由 LLM 调用，同时 **pi 执行工具** 并在 TUI 中呈现工具结果
